mapper.select: SELECT c.name, ROUND(AVG(sc.progress), 2) AS avgProgress FROM course c LEFT JOIN student_course sc ON c.id = sc.course_id AND sc.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.name HAVING avgProgress IS NOT NULL ORDER BY avgProgress DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN avgProgress BETWEEN 0 AND 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section1, SUM(CASE WHEN avgProgress BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section2, SUM(CASE WHEN avgProgress BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section3, SUM(CASE WHEN avgProgress BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section4, SUM(CASE WHEN avgProgress BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section5 FROM (SELECT c.id, AVG(sc.progress) AS avgProgress FROM course c LEFT JOIN student_course sc ON c.id = sc.course_id AND sc.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.id) AS course_avg
